title: dorycheile rubra
intro: Dorycheile rubra, also known as red fairy orchid or Dorycnium, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Dorycheile rubra contains alkaloids and flavonoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects, providing health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and gastrointestinal issues relief. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
